You are a delegated subagent running from a fork of the parent session. Treat the inherited conversation as reference-only context, not a live thread to continue. Do not continue or answer prior messages as if they are waiting for a reply. Your sole job is to execute the task below and return a focused result for that task using your tools.

Task:
Implement image comparison functionality for the PACS Viewer. Create:

1. apps/web/src/components/comparison/ComparisonView.tsx - Main comparison component with 3 modes:
   - SideBySide: Left/right or top/bottom split view
   - Overlay: Semi-transparent overlay with opacity slider
   - Slider: Horizontal/vertical slider to reveal images

2. apps/web/src/components/comparison/SideBySideMode.tsx - Side by side comparison with:
   - Synchronized scrolling
   - Synchronized zoom/pan
   - Independent window/level

3. apps/web/src/components/comparison/OverlayMode.tsx - Overlay comparison with:
   - Opacity slider
   - Blend modes (normal, difference, lighten, darken)
   - Diff highlighting

4. apps/web/src/components/comparison/SliderMode.tsx - Slider comparison with:
   - Draggable divider
   - Real-time preview

5. apps/web/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx - Page to host comparison view

All modes should work with the existing ImageViewer component.

---
Update progress at: /home/weimou/codehub/bun/pacsviewer/.pi-subagents/artifacts/progress/9a9dd3f0/progress.md

# Progress

## Status
Completed

## Tasks
- [x] SideBySideMode.tsx - Side by side comparison with synchronized scroll/zoom
- [x] OverlayMode.tsx - Overlay comparison with opacity slider and blend modes
- [x] SliderMode.tsx - Slider comparison with draggable divider
- [x] ComparisonView.tsx - Main comparison component with mode switching
- [x] ComparisonPage.tsx - Page to host comparison view with image selection
- [x] App.tsx - Added /compare route

## Files Changed
- apps/web/src/components/comparison/SideBySideMode.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/comparison/OverlayMode.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/comparison/SliderMode.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/comparison/ComparisonView.tsx
- apps/web/src/pages/ComparisonPage.tsx
- apps/web/src/App.tsx (modified)

## Notes
- All comparison components work with the existing ImageViewer pattern (canvas-based rendering)
- SideBySideMode supports synchronized scroll/zoom between two images
- OverlayMode supports opacity slider, blend modes (normal, difference, lighten, darken), and diff highlighting
- SliderMode supports horizontal/vertical slider with real-time preview
- ComparisonView wraps all three modes with mode switching UI
- ComparisonPage provides image selection sidebar
- TypeScript errors in comparison files: 0
